title: [LLHD] Assigning a signal to itself makes Sig2Reg hang

features.name: nonblocking assignment in always block
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking procedural assignment (<=) inside an always block with clocked sensitivity
features.snippet: always @(negedge clk) begin q <= d; end

features.name: continuous assignment to signal
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment using the assign keyword to a signal

features.name: self_referencing assignment creates combinational loop
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment where the left-hand side signal appears on the right-hand side, creating a combinational loop

features.name: mixed procedural and continuous assignment to same signal
features.description: Code should include both a procedural non-blocking assignment and a continuous assignment targeting the same signal, which violates IEEE 1800 multiple driver semantics
features.snippet:
always @(negedge clk) begin q <= d; end
assign q = q;
